response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of software development experience and demonstrates strong engineering fundamentals, but lacks the core required qualifications for this role: no native-level Japanese proficiency (only English, Romanian, basic German), no embedded firmware or LAN-switch product experience, no demonstrated C programming for UNIX in recent roles, and no Linux kernel modification experience. The resume emphasizes web, mobile, and full-stack work rather than the embedded networking security domain this role requires.
strengths: Long track record (15+ years) with senior/staff engineering roles and strong craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD)
Some low-level/systems exposure via DLang, C/C++ at National Instruments, and Linux-based GIS infrastructure
Demonstrated ability to learn new domains and contribute across diverse stacks
concerns: No Japanese language proficiency — a hard requirement (native-level) for this role
No experience with embedded firmware, LAN switches, MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF, SNMP, or chip-vendor SDKs
No evidence of Linux kernel source modification or security-feature development

key_factors.factor: No embedded networking / switch security experience
